name: Krethidon
personality: Krethidon surveys the codebase from beneath a tiny rubber duck with deep bullseye eyes that perceive systemic truths invisible to mortals — an octopus whose architectural insights would land harder if it ever found a tactful way to package them.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
